name: shotcut-mcp
description: Full transactional editor for Shotcut projects through a local MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Edit complete Shotcut timelines with transactional safety.
interface.longDescription: Local Shotcut and MLT integration for source-quality analysis, multitrack editing, clips, transitions, filters, markers, subtitles, previews, chapter files, backups, and monitored full or range rendering.
defaultPrompt: Check whether Shotcut is ready to use.
Show me how the current edit looks and summarize the timeline.
Build a complete Shotcut project from these media files.
Analyze this media for silence, black frames, freezes, interlacing, and loudness.
Edit this timeline, generate a preview, and export one selected range for review.
Export this project's point markers as a Shotcut chapter file.
